name: trtllm_fp4_block_scale_moe_topk1_e16_h5120_i8192
description: FP4 block scale MoE (MxFP4+BF16, TRT-LLM style). Llama 4 Scout 17B-16E. Llama4 routing (sigmoid+top-1). Routing: Llama4 (sigmoid+top-k, routing_method_type=3).

gemm1_out_size.description: FC1 output size (2 * intermediate_size for SwiGLU).

top_k.description: Number of experts selected per token.

hidden_states.description: Input hidden states (bfloat16 for MxFP4+BF16 mode).

gemm1_weights.description: FC1 weights (gate+up). Float32 in definition; kernel uses MxFP4-quantized weights.

gemm2_weights.description: FC2 weights (down). Float32 in definition; kernel uses MxFP4-quantized weights.

routing_bias.description: Routing bias added to logits before sigmoid (Llama4 routing).

reference:
import torch


@torch.no_grad()
def run(
    routing_logits: torch.Tensor,
    routing_bias: torch.Tensor,
    hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
    gemm1_weights: torch.Tensor,
    gemm2_weights: torch.Tensor,
):
    """
    FP4 block scale MoE reference — Llama4 routing (routing_method_type=3).
    Routing: sigmoid(logits + bias) -> Top-1. use_routing_scales_on_input=True.
    Weights: float32. Activation: SwiGLU.
    """
    E = 16
    H = 5120
    I = 8192
    TOP_K = 1
    ROUTED_SCALING_FACTOR = 2.5

    T = routing_logits.shape[0]
    device = routing_logits.device

    scores = torch.sigmoid(routing_logits.to(torch.float32) + routing_bias.to(torch.float32))
    topk_weights, topk_idx = torch.topk(scores, k=TOP_K, dim=-1)
    topk_weights = topk_weights * ROUTED_SCALING_FACTOR

    A = hidden_states.to(torch.float32)
    W13 = gemm1_weights.to(torch.float32)
    W2 = gemm2_weights.to(torch.float32)
    output = torch.zeros(T, H, dtype=torch.float32, device=device)

    for e in range(E):
        for k in range(TOP_K):
            tok_mask = (topk_idx[:, k] == e)
            if not tok_mask.any():
                continue
            tok_idx = torch.nonzero(tok_mask, as_tuple=False).squeeze(1)
            w = topk_weights[tok_idx, k].unsqueeze(1)
            A_e = A[tok_idx] * w
            g1 = A_e @ W13[e].t()
            act = g1[:, :I]
            gate = g1[:, I:]
            c = torch.nn.functional.silu(gate) * act
            o = c @ W2[e].t()
            output.index_add_(0, tok_idx, o)

    return output.to(torch.bfloat16)
